title: Learning to think in systems
description: Started as an independent game developer, where I learned how to break complex ideas into systems, iterate quickly, and solve problems independently. Working on multiplayer games introduced me to client/server communication, game architecture, and long-term project development.

title: Transitioning to backend engineering
description: Transitioned from game development to backend engineering, focusing on building maintainable server-side applications and understanding how web systems communicate, process requests, and manage data.

title: Designing maintainable systems
description: Shifted my attention toward designing maintainable software, learning architectural principles, secure application development, and production-oriented backend practices.

title: Moving toward production-ready systems
description: Currently focusing on the technologies and engineering practices required to build reliable production systems, with an emphasis on scalability, maintainability, deployment, and modern backend architecture.

title: Distributed systems & high-scale engineering
description: My long-term goal is to deepen my understanding of distributed systems, cloud-native architectures, and high-scale backend engineering while continuing to improve my system design skills.
